center.name: 佛羅里達礁島群
center.summary: 佛羅里達礁島群是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括White-crowned pigeon、大藍鷺、Antillean nighthawk，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Antillean nighthawk (Chordeiles gundlachii) is a nightjar native to the Caribbean, The Bahamas, and Florida Keys

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the United States, it is found only in the Florida Keys, Everglades, and the southern tip of mainland Florida. They will often spend the winter in the Caribbean islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An all-white population found in South Florida and the Florida Keys is known as the great white heron
